description_long: This bungalow features a modern, L-shaped layout with a flat roof and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The main structure is complemented by a landscaped yard with a row of trees and a driveway leading to a garage. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to a spacious outdoor patio, which includes a pool and seating area. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with wooden accents visible on the patio and fencing. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some metal and wood elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open living spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, L-shaped bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and an outdoor patio with a pool.
description_view_0: This view highlights the separation between the main living area and the garage, as well as the landscaped yard and driveway.
description_view_1: From this angle, the open patio, pool area, and row of trees along the yard are most prominent.
description_view_2: This side showcases the large windows, sliding doors, and the outdoor seating area adjacent to the pool.
description_view_3: Here, the front facade with the main entrance, patio, and the connection between the two building wings is visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
